title: Evident Technologies
summary: AI-powered litigation support and evidence analysis platform
description: Advanced document intelligence system for legal professionals, featuring OCR, automated metadata extraction, and case management tools. Serves as the umbrella platform for the entire ecosystem.

title: Founder Hub
summary: Personal operations hub, investor portal, and portfolio platform
description: Full-featured founder dashboard with investor relations, court case management, service marketplace, multi-site management, and theme engine. Powers devon-tyler.com with a complete admin backend.

title: Tillerstead
summary: Licensed NJ home improvement contractor — professional tile installation
description: Business website for Tillerstead, a licensed NJ Home Improvement Contractor (HIC #13VH10808800) specializing in TCNA-compliant professional tile installation services across South Jersey. Active revenue-generating business.

title: Civics Hierarchy
summary: Constitutional law reference and legal authority mapping tool
description: Interactive platform mapping the hierarchy of U.S. legal authority — from the Constitution through federal and state law. Designed to make civic education accessible and legally accurate.

title: Document Library
summary: DOJ evidence analysis and document processing platform
description: Searchable document library for public records research, evidence analysis, and legal document processing. Integrated with the Evident ecosystem for cross-referencing case materials.

title: Essential Goods Ledger
summary: Commodity pricing and cost-of-living data tracker
description: Real-time economic analysis tool tracking essential commodity prices and cost-of-living indicators. Built to make economic data transparent and actionable for everyday decision-making.

title: Geneva Bible Study
summary: Historical Bible study tool with Geneva Bible annotations
description: Interactive scripture study platform featuring the Geneva Bible with original annotations, cross-references, and historical context. Purpose-built for serious biblical scholarship.

title: Informed Consent
summary: Health advocacy and informed consent resource platform
description: Comprehensive health information platform providing evidence-based resources for medical decision-making and informed consent documentation.

title: Contractor Command Center
summary: Construction project management and contractor operations tool
description: Operations platform for construction professionals — project tracking, client management, and business administration tools designed for licensed contractors.
